violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. License expired earlier in the year. PIC stated they will re-sign up for class. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC stated new blade will be put on. Can opener to be sanitized after every use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (Currently has air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed in 3-bay. Slicer was in process of being broken down to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of the prep unit have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
